description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can with a vibrant red exterior, featuring a white script logo and decorative white accents. The can has a smooth, glossy surface and a standard pull-tab opening on the top, which is silver in color. The branding is prominently displayed in a flowing script, wrapping partially around the can's body. The can's proportions are typical of a soft drink container, with a height greater than its diameter. The top and bottom edges are slightly rounded, and the can appears undamaged and intact. No contents are visible through the opaque body, and the can is designed to be easily held and carried.
description: A red, glossy cylindrical can with white script branding and a silver pull-tab top, typical of a soft drink container.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main white script logo on the red can body, with the pull-tab top visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the logo partially visible, showing more of the can's curvature and the silver top.
description_view_2: Rear view with less branding visible, mostly showing the red surface and white accent lines.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the logo partially visible and the can's cylindrical shape clear.
attribute_label_or_branding: White script logo and text on a red background, with decorative white accents; branding is prominent and wraps around the can.
